title: tasks.yaml — PM task graph v2 (refactor-004: features[] + agent_sequence[])
description: Produced by /pm --mode=tasks. The primary input to the feature-graph phase of the orchestrator. Version 2.0 (refactor-004) introduces 'features[]' as a first-class grouping over tasks — each feature carries its own worktree, branch, and agent sequence. Version 1.0 (pre-refactor-004) had a flat 'tasks:' array with a single 'agent' field per task and no first-class feature concept; it is deprecated and the orchestrator will reject v1 tasks.yaml with a guidance error.

version.description: Schema version. Must be '2.0' for refactor-004 tasks.yaml. Orchestrator reads this first — a missing/wrong version triggers a migration-guidance error, not a validation-failure retry.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the PM agent wrote this file. Advisory; not hash-bound.

project_name.description: Copied from docs/brief-summary.json.projectName. Round-tripped for human readability of the tasks.yaml in isolation.

architecture_ref.description: Path to architecture.yaml this tasks.yaml was generated against. Typically '.claude/architecture.yaml'. Provides audit trail when architecture + tasks evolve together.

ui_kit_version.description: Frozen snapshot of packages/ui-kit/package.json.version at PM run time. Builders check this against current kit version; mismatch triggers a kit-change-request detour.

features.description: Ordered list of features. Orchestrator runs features concurrently up to maxConcurrentFeatures, respecting feature.depends_on. An empty features[] is valid but suspicious (PM produced no work for a post-design project); PM should emit a warning when this happens.

by_agent.description: { 'backend-builder': 12, 'web-frontend-builder': 18, 'tester': 30, ... } — sum of tasks assigned per agent across all features.

summary_counts.description: Advisory aggregate counts. The orchestrator computes these independently from features[]; a discrepancy between declared and computed counts surfaces as a warning (not a hard fail).

warnings.description: Non-blocking issues the PM agent surfaced: 'features_count=0' if no work was produced, 'uncovered_brief_section' if a brief feature entry didn't map to a feature, 'circular_dependency_detected' if feature.depends_on forms a cycle (orchestrator will reject this at runtime).
